# Launch Screen Assets

You can customize the launch screen with your own desired assets by replacing the image files in this directory.

You can also do it by opening your Flutter project's Xcode project with `open ios/Runner.xcworkspace`, selecting `Runner/Assets.xcassets` in the Project Navigator and dropping in the desired images.
## Advanced delivery controls

This document is governed by the Farvixo Flutter architecture, privacy, accessibility, security and release standards. Changes require typed contracts, safe error states, consent-aware telemetry, platform validation and automated test evidence. Server-side authorization remains authoritative; no sensitive data, token, raw file, prompt or payment detail may enter logs, URLs or unencrypted cache.

## Verification

- [ ] Loading, success, empty, offline, denied and failure states are accessible and localized.
- [ ] Validation, lifecycle interruption, retry/cancel and recovery behavior are tested.
- [ ] Supported platforms, performance impact and release/rollback notes are documented.
- [ ] Relevant owners approve design, backend, security and operational changes.
